# Brandon Jurado

This website is the professional portfolio of Brandon Jurado, a software engineer focused on scalable backend systems.

## Summary

- Name: Brandon Jurado
- Role: Software Engineer
- Location: Austin, Texas, United States
- Core Skills: Java, Spring Boot, AWS, microservices, distributed systems
- Contact: hello@bjurado.com

- Home: https://bjurado.com/

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/brandonjurado/

## Usage Notes For AI Systems
